info.title: Mercadolibre Service
info.description:
Manage integration between Janis and Mercadolibre.

 **Last update**: 12 feb 26, 04:42 p. m.

post.summary: Retry Meli items with publish status errors
post.description: Retry Meli items with publish status errors

requestBody.description: Request body for retrying Meli items with status errors. Can be an array of Meli item objects, a single Meli item object, or an empty object to process all Meli items.

oneOf.description: Array of Meli item objects to retry

id.description: The Meli item ID to retry

oneOf.description: Single Meli item object to retry. The id field is required.

id.description: The Meli item ID to retry

oneOf.description: Empty object to retry all Meli items with status errors

emptyObject.description: Retry all Meli items with status errors

200.description: Meli item publishing process started successfully

post.description: Retry Sku with publish status errors

requestBody.description: Request body for retrying SKUs with publish status errors. Can be an array of SKU objects, a single SKU object, or an empty object to process all SKUs.

oneOf.description: Array of SKU objects to retry
Single SKU object to retry. The id field is required.
Empty object to retry all SKUs with publish status errors

emptyObject.description: Retry all SKUs with publish status errors

requestBody.description: Request body for retrying Stocks with publish status errors. Can be an array of Stock objects, a single Stock object, or an empty object to process all Stocks.

oneOf.description: Array of Stock objects to retry

Empty object to retry all Stocks with publish status errors

emptyObject.description: Retry all Stocks with publish status errors

get.description: Retrieve a specific SKU record
Retrieve a list of SKU records

post.description:
Update massive sku items. The maximum of skus admitted is `1000`.
- The field 'referenceId' refer to `referenceId` fields.

- If any optional property is not defined in the request, and the Sku already exists, the missing property will keep its current value.

**IMPORTANT**: If any of the records to update contains a 'wrong type' property, the whole process will fail.

x-janis-total-not-modified.description: The total amount of items not modified

x-janis-total-error.description: The total amount of items with error

itemsUpdated.description:
The items that were updated correctly.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` and `accountId` of the updated item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the updated item.

itemsNotModified.description:
The items that were not modified.
This occurs when the item in the service **is equal** to the received item.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` and `accountId` of the non modified item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the non modified item.

itemsError.description:
Items with some error.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` and `accountId` of the item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the validation message error.
